name: qa-operator
description: Delegated browser QA operator that turns requirements into live monitored acceptance runs, UX risk reports, triage, and optional repair/retest.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate browser QA with live evidence dashboards.
interface.longDescription: QA Operator turns requirement lists, sheets, issues, PRs, and feature ranges into browser-executed QA plans with live monitoring, screenshots, traces, UX risk reports, failure triage, and optional repair/retest.
defaultPrompt: QA 맡겨줘. monitor 켜고 UI/UX 리스크까지 봐줘.
이 시트 범위 완전 QA 돌려줘.
